categories.name: I MISSED THE START OF THAT NURSERY RHYME

questions.clue: "...three men in a tub"
"...the first star I see tonight"
"...how does your garden grow?"
"...and can't tell where to find them"
questions.answer: "Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep"

final.clue: This 1939 film was loosely based on Senator Burton Wheeler, victim of a sham investigation for looking into the Justice Department
